## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build Inferpal/Inferpal.csproj -c Release` passes (warnings-as-errors)
- [ ] `dotnet test Inferpal.Tests/Inferpal.Tests.csproj` passes (added/updated tests where it makes sense)
- [ ] New user-facing strings are added to **all** `.resx` locales **and** to `Strings.cs`
- [ ] Docs updated under `docs/` if behavior or configuration changed
- [ ] New filesystem/command/network actions are approval-gated and workspace-confined
